name: Extract News Article Metadata from Website

parameters.content:
## Extract News Article Metadata from Website

Media monitoring teams use this recipe to turn public article pages into structured metadata for research and alerts. Extract headline, author, date, summary, category, and named entities.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Extract Website Data
Resource: **Website Extraction**

Configure the public website URL and schema below, then connect your credentials.

parameters.schemaJson: {"fields":[{"name":"headline","type":"TEXT","description":"Article headline"},{"name":"author","type":"TEXT","description":"Article author"},{"name":"published_date","type":"DATE","description":"Publication date"},{"name":"summary","type":"TEXTAREA","description":"Short article summary"},{"name":"entities","type":"ARRAY","description":"Named entities mentioned in the article","fields":[{"name":"entity","type":"TEXT","description":"One named entity"}]}]}
